title: Yijing Hexagram 18: Gu (Work on What Has Been Spoiled)
description: Hexagram 18 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 18 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Work on what has been spoiled has supreme success. It furthers one to cross the great water.
